name: Heath Bar Brunch Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cream butter and gradually add the light brown sugar and sugar until well combined.
3. Blend in flour and 1/4 teaspoon salt; mix thoroughly.
4. Reserve 1 cup of this mixture for topping.
5. In a separate bowl, combine buttermilk, baking soda, 1/8 teaspoon salt, egg, and vanilla. Stir into the remaining butter-sugar mixture.
6. Fold in 2 finely chopped chilled Heath bars.
7. Pour batter into a buttered 13 x 9 pan and sprinkle with the reserved topping, pecans, and additional crushed Heath bars.
8. Bake for 35 - 40 minutes. Serve with cocoa-flavored whipped cream or coffee ice cream.
